channel.title: Trilio Continuous Restore on Validated Patterns
channel.description: Recent content in Trilio Continuous Restore on Validated Patterns

item.title: Prerequisites
item.description: Prerequisites Clusters Cluster Role Minimum size Hub Primary; runs ACM, HashiCorp Vault, ArgoCD, Trilio 3 worker nodes, 8 vCPU / 32 GB each DR Spoke Disaster Recovery target 3 worker nodes, 8 vCPU / 32 GB each Both clusters must:

item.title: Getting started
item.description: Deploying the pattern Deployment 1. Clone the repository git clone https://github.com/trilio-demo/trilio-continuous-restore cd trilio-continuous-restore 2. Configure S3 bucket details Edit values-hub.yaml and values-secondary.

item.title: CR operations
item.description: Operations Monitoring DR status # Hub — all phases make dr-status # Spoke — ConsistentSet and restore status (run on spoke context) oc get configmap trilio-cr-status -n imperative -o yaml Automated DR lifecycle The imperative framework runs continuously on a 10-minute schedule with no manual intervention required.

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.description: Troubleshooting Trilio operator not installing oc get subscription k8s-triliovault -n trilio-system -o yaml oc get installplan -n trilio-system Check that the certified-operators CatalogSource is healthy:
